mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hx_activity WHERE del_flag = '0') as activityCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hx_activity WHERE del_flag = '0' AND status = '1') as ongoingActivityCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hx_student_profile) as studentCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(points), 0) FROM hx_point_log) as totalPoints, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hx_story WHERE del_flag = '0') as storyCount, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM hx_activity_participant WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) as weeklyParticipantCount

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM hx_activity WHERE del_flag = '0' AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(event_time, '%Y-%m') as month, SUM(points) as points FROM hx_point_log WHERE event_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(event_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT story_id, title, view_count, like_count, publish_time FROM hx_story WHERE del_flag = '0' AND status = '1' ORDER BY view_count DESC, like_count DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT activity_id, title, status, start_time, end_time, participant_count, publish_time FROM hx_activity WHERE del_flag = '0' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT story_id, title, status, view_count, like_count, publish_time FROM hx_story WHERE del_flag = '0' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT log_id, user_id, user_name, biz_type, points, remark, event_time FROM hx_point_log WHERE event_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 10
